White Chicks (2004)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $69,148,997Details
International Box Office $42,300,000
Worldwide Box Office $111,448,997
Further financial details...

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$19,676,748 (28.5% of total gross)
Legs:3.51 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:62.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$20,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.6 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,726 opening theaters/2,800 max. theaters, 4.2 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $133,175,844

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: June 23rd, 2004 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: August 5th, 2004 (Wide) (Australia)
Video Release: October 26th, 2004 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for crude and sexual humor, language and some drug content
Running Time: 109 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Family Affair, Relatives Playing Relatives
Plot point: Cross-Dressing, Dysfunctional Family, FBI, Forbidden Romance, Kidnap, Money Troubles, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Undercover
Subgenre: Farcical / Slapstick Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
